text: Imagine a bay lighting up like a starry night sky. This incredible display is caused by tiny organisms called dinoflagellates. When disturbed, they produce a brilliant blue light, creating a living light show. This phenomenon is most famous in places like Mosquito Bay in Vieques. But remember, these ecosystems are fragile and need our protection. Want to learn more about our oceans? Follow for more insights on marine life!
